commandToggleTranslation.message: Toggle bilingual translation on the current page

contentNoOperationResult.message: The translation action returned no result.

contentReloadRequired.message: DualRead AI was updated. Refresh this page before continuing.

contentStoppedRetryUnavailable.message: Page translation has stopped. Start translation again from the extension popup.

costHintEager.message: Prefetch more nearby article text for smoother reading, with higher token cost.

costHintEconomy.message: Save tokens by translating fewer nearby blocks.

displayModeHelp.message: Choose how translations are displayed in webpages.

errorApiKeyMissing.message: DualRead AI cannot read an API Key. Open settings and confirm it is saved. If it is already saved, you may have loaded a different extension copy.

errorApiMissingContent.message: The API response did not include choices[0].message.content.

errorApiTimeout.message: API request timed out after $1 seconds.

errorMissingParagraphTranslation.message: The model did not return a translation for this paragraph.

errorModelMissing.message: Enter a model name in settings first.

errorModelReturnedNonArray.message: The model response is not a JSON array.

errorParseJson.message: Could not parse the model JSON response: $1

errorTestNoTranslation.message: The test request did not return a translation.

errorUnsupportedTab.message: This page does not allow extension script injection.

errorUnsupportedTabTest.message: This page does not allow extension script injection. Test on a regular webpage.

extensionDescription.message: AI bilingual webpage translation with original text preserved and translations shown nearby.

languageStatusSame.message: Source and target are both $1, so translation is usually unnecessary.

messageApiUrlModelRequired.message: API URL and model name are required.

messageAutoSaveMissing.message: API URL and model name are required. Changes were not auto-saved.

messageCompleteConnectionFirst.message: Enter API URL, API Key, and model name first.

messagePromptAlreadyDefault.message: The prompt is already the default.

messageResetAllDone.message: All settings were restored to defaults.

noticeSelectionAlreadyTarget.message: The selected text is already in the target language.

noticeTranslationAlreadyActive.message: Translation is already active. Scroll the page or use Translate screen in the popup.

optionsAdvancedSettingsDesc.message: Prompt, batching, concurrency, cache, and detailed cost limits.

optionsApiKeyHelp.message: Stored only in local Chrome extension storage. It is not sent to this project.

optionsApiTimeoutHelp.message: Increase this for slow networks or slower reasoning models. Default is 120 seconds.

optionsApiUrlHelp.message: Use any OpenAI-compatible proxy or local service endpoint.

optionsAutoTranslateHelp.message: The page language is checked first. Pages already in the target language are skipped.

optionsAutoTranslateLabel.message: Auto start translation on foreign-language pages

optionsCostControlDesc.message: Translate nearby visible content first to reduce token usage.

optionsLanguageDesc.message: Default is English to Simplified Chinese. Target-language pages are skipped automatically.

optionsMaxConcurrentHelp.message: Recommended: 2. Use 3 only when your API and network are stable.

optionsModelHelp.message: A recommended model is filled in after you choose a provider. You can still edit it.

optionsPrivacyNote.message: API Key stays in local extension storage. Page text is sent only to the API endpoint you configure.

optionsPromptHelp.message: Supports {{sourceLanguage}} and {{targetLanguage}} placeholders. The JSON array of text blocks is appended automatically.

optionsQuickStartDesc.message: Most users only need these three steps.

optionsReadingExperienceDesc.message: Defaults are tuned to be quiet, readable, and cost-aware.

optionsSourceLanguageHelp.message: Use Auto detect when you are not sure what language the page uses.

optionsSubtitle.message: Bilingual webpage translation settings. Changes are saved automatically.

optionsTargetLanguageHelp.message: Translations are inserted below the original text.

optionsUiLanguageHelp.message: Only changes extension UI and notices. Translation source and target languages stay separate.

optionsViewportOnly.message: Only translate the current screen and nearby content

optionsViewportOnlyHelp.message: Recommended. If disabled, per-page request and character budgets still apply.

popupActionHintInitial.message: Start translating the current page or only the current screen.

popupActiveHint.message: Scroll to translate newly visible text. Hide translations to view the original page.

popupAutoDisabledStatus.message: Auto translate is off. Existing translations stay on the page.

popupAutoEnabledUnsupportedStatus.message: Auto translate is on. It will run on regular foreign-language webpages.

popupAutoUnconfiguredHint.message: Configure the API first, then translate the page.

popupAutoUnconfiguredStatus.message: Auto translation did not start: API Key and model are missing.

popupConfigNoticeText.message: Please enter an API Key and model first.

popupConfirmClearTranslations.message: Clear translations inserted on this page? Local cache will not be deleted.

popupDisplayModeSavedButNotApplied.message: Display mode was saved, but cannot be applied to this page right now.

popupDisplayModeSavedForNormalPages.message: Display mode saved. It will apply on regular webpages.

popupIdleHint.message: Start page translation, or translate only the current screen.

popupIdleStatus.message: Original text is preserved. Translations appear below it.

popupLoadFailedHint.message: Open settings to check your configuration, or reload the extension and try again.

popupSkippedTargetLanguageHint.message: No page translation is needed. Select specific foreign text and use right-click translation if needed.

popupSkippedTargetLanguageStatus.message: Skipped: this page is already in the target language.

popupUnconfiguredHint.message: Open settings, complete the API connection, then return to translate.

popupUnconfiguredStatus.message: Not ready: enter an API Key and model first.

popupUnsupportedConfiguredHint.message: Auto translate and display mode are saved as global settings and will apply on supported webpages.

popupUnsupportedHint.message: Chrome settings, extension pages, and new tab pages cannot be translated.

popupUnsupportedPageStatus.message: This page cannot be translated. Open a regular http/https webpage.

popupUnsupportedUnconfiguredHint.message: Finish API setup first, then open a regular foreign-language webpage.

providerHintCustom.message: For custom OpenAI-compatible services. Thinking controls are inferred from the API URL and model.

providerHintDashscope.message: DashScope-compatible Qwen endpoint. The model name can be changed manually.

providerHintLocal.message: For self-hosted or local OpenAI-compatible services.

selectionCopyFailedStatus.message: Copy failed. Select and copy the translation manually.

setupErrorText.message: $1 Update the connection settings and test again.

setupMissingText.message: Complete the fields, then click Test API.

setupReadyText.message: Press Enter or click Test API to verify this provider.

setupSuccessText.message: Return to a webpage and start translating.

setupTestingText.message: Sending a test request to the selected provider.

thinkingHintAuto.message: Strongly recommended. Keep this enabled so DualRead can choose thinking-control parameters from the API URL and model name.

thinkingHintDashscope.message: Adds enable_thinking: false to the request body.

thinkingHintDisabled.message: Not recommended: no thinking-disable parameter will be sent, and reasoning models may be much slower.

thinkingHintDisabledObject.message: Adds thinking: { type: "disabled" } to the request body.

thinkingHintNone.message: No extra thinking-control parameters will be sent.

thinkingHintOpenRouterLow.message: Adds reasoning_effort: "low" to the request body.

thinkingHintOpenRouterMinimal.message: Adds reasoning: { effort: "minimal", exclude: true } to the request body.

thinkingHintSelfHosted.message: Adds chat_template_kwargs.enable_thinking = false to the request body.

thinkingSummaryDisabled.message: Thinking not disabled; may be slower

tooltipAutoTranslate.message: Save as a global switch. Foreign-language webpages will translate automatically.

tooltipAutoTranslateGlobalOnly.message: Saved as a global setting. It will apply on regular foreign-language webpages.

tooltipClearTranslations.message: Remove translations inserted on this page. Local cache will not be deleted.

tooltipHideTranslations.message: Temporarily hide translations on this page without clearing cache.

tooltipNeedConfig.message: Enter an API Key and model name in settings first.

tooltipNoTranslations.message: This page has no translations yet.

tooltipScanCurrentScreen.message: Only process text near the current viewport to control token usage.

tooltipStartTranslation.message: Translate this webpage. Scrolling will keep translating nearby content.

tooltipStopTranslation.message: Stop translating new content. Existing translations stay visible.

tooltipUnsupportedPage.message: This is not a regular webpage, so translation scripts cannot be injected.
